author: naazimsnh02
blurb: Complementary Training + Backoff N-gram Mixer + Legal Score-First TTT
techniques: AdamW TTT (lr=5e-4, 3 epochs, freeze 2 blocks, Polyak 0.998)
run_command: VRL_ENABLED=1 LEAKY_RELU=1 TTT_ENABLED=1 TTT_OPTIMIZER=adamw TTT_LR=0.0005 TTT_EPOCHS=3 TTT_FREEZE_BLOCKS=2 TTT_TEMPERATURE=0.98 USE_HEDGE_MIXER=1 NGRAM_ORDER=10 NGRAM_BUCKETS=4194304 ALPHA_BASE=0.20 ALPHA_RANGE=0.55 ALPHA_CENTER=3.0 COMPLEMENT_ALPHA=0.5 SEED=42 torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=8 train_gpt.py
